 Hi,
 
 Would you like to handle further maintenance of this port?
 Unfortunately I have abandoned FreeBSD due to poor support from proprietary
 vendors(Android is just one of the examples). I like the system, it's fast
 and reliable, but looks like I have to use Arch at least.
 
 2011/4/13 <dgeo@centrale-marseille.fr>
